ddt:Target.Name: VSP_v1a7
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ******************** Version DD/MM/YYYY: Change description
v0.1 31/mar/2017 : Initial Version v0.2 13/Jul/2017 : Name modified as VSP instead of VSP_R0-13. v0.3 03/Oct/2017 : Added X10ph2 vehicle project v0.4 10/Oct/2017 : Added Diag mux DTCs as per DTS V1.5 Added DID $4A01 as per DTS V1.5 Other DIDs & LIDs added as per DTS V1.5. Deleted LID $2101-Vehicle group information data. 21/Feb/2018 : DTC $9341 55 Missing configuration is added as per DED_VSP_V1.3 (EN).doc. v0.5 29/Mar/2018 : Modification done as per DTS V1.8 especially the LIDs section. 29-May-2018 : DID F187 is deleted as we have this info in LID $2180 itself.
V0.6 6-Jun-2018 : Communication Failure of ATCU ECU DTC is changed from $E15D to E141 as per DUD as discussed with George
V0.7 27/07/2018: [Hariharan sheela] Auto identification : Vdiag Modified Snapshot requests added
V0.8 09/08/2018: (Tutuianu George) Modified PartNumber.BasicPartList (28115 --> 256A8)
V0.9 09/08/2018: (Tutuianu George) Modified PartNumber.BasicPartList (283C2 --> 285R7)
V1.0 27/11/2018: autoident added 04 U2F 004 007
V1.1 22/01/2019 : AutoIdent added 04 U2F 005 001 AutoIdent added 04 U2F 004 005 Add configuration parameters - DTC_SWITCH_ENABLE - DTC_LED_ENABLE
V1a2 09/05/2019 : AutoIdent added 04 U2F 00 05 00 04 Add configuration parameters - ENG_SPD_TRESH
V1a3 11/06/2019 : AutoIdent added 04 U2F 00 05 00 07 AutoIdent added 04 U2F 00 05 00 97
V1a4 13/12/2019 : AutoIdent added 04 U2F 00 05 00 08 Project XJL added 1906 / 1904 services updated 22F0D0/22FOD1 updated Requests tagged maintainability report ECM/ATCU config screen update V1a7 15/04/2020: Autoident only XFK part Add configuration for reverse sound

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: VIN.CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: No test in progress. Test OK
Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)

Data.Name: VIN.VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: NissanID.DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: NissanID.EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Data.Name: NissanID.HardwareNumberLowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Data.Name: NissanID.SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Fault counter

Item.Text: Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)
Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)

Data.Name: Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Fault counter

Item.Text: Play Admit to charge battery sound request
Play Unlock charging plug sound request
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked

Data.Name: VSP Configuration Parameters. Engine Speed Treshold
Data.Comment: Engine speed treshold for hybrid vehicle

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: HardwareNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ECUReset.hard
Request.Comment: Reset HARD of ECU

Request.Name: ECUReset.config
Request.Comment: Reset HARD of ECU

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: TesterPresent

Request.Name: DataRead.VIN
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

Request.Name: DataRead.Traceability
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: StartDefaultSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: DataWrite.VIN
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

DataItem.Name: VSP Configuration Parameters. Engine Speed Treshold
VSP Configuration Parameters. Engine Speed Treshold

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Nissan
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: DataRead.Multiplex network diagnostic request
Request.Comment: Multiplex network diagnostic request

DataItem.Name: Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Fault counter

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Daimler
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Nissan ID

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR1.FC
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R1 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR1.FA
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R1 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR1.FE
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R1 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
- except for phone acoustic parameters, acoustic paremeters, radio reception, ...
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account

Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Fault counter

Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Fault counter

Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Fault counter

Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Fault counter
